title: Dense Fresh British Dough Flatbread
description: A high-protein, dense, and fresh flatbread perfect for post-workout snacking. Made with a hint of blue food colouring, this British dish is a twist on traditional flatbreads.

ingredients.name: Self-raising flour
ingredients.notes: Use a British self-raising flour for the best results

ingredients.name: Greek yoghurt
ingredients.notes: Make sure the yoghurt is full-fat for extra protein

ingredients.name: Blue food colouring
ingredients.notes: Add a hint of blue to the dough

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for added flavour

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground black pepper for the best results

ingredients.name: Cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional, add grated cheddar for an extra burst of flavour

instructions: In a large bowl, combine self-raising flour, baking soda, and bicarbonate of soda
Add Greek yoghurt, egg, blue food colouring, salt, and black pepper to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover it with cling film, and let it rest for 1 hour
Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on the desired size
Roll out each piece into a ball and flatten it slightly into a disk shape
Brush the tops with olive oil and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown
Serve warm, topped with grated cheddar cheese if desired
